evals.prompt: Add a 'tags' column (JSONB array) to the existing products table in our NestJS + Prisma project. The table has 500K rows. Write a zero-downtime migration that adds the column, backfills existing products with empty array, and adds an index.
evals.expected_output: Prisma migration with nullable column add, backfill script, NOT NULL constraint, and GIN index

assertions.name: nullable_first
assertions.description: Adds column as nullable initially (backward compatible)

assertions.name: backfill
assertions.description: Script to backfill existing rows with empty array

assertions.name: not_null_after
assertions.description: Adds NOT NULL constraint after backfill completes

assertions.name: gin_index
assertions.description: GIN index for efficient JSONB queries

assertions.name: zero_downtime
assertions.description: Migration doesn't lock the table during backfill

evals.prompt: Migrate our Django project from SQLite to PostgreSQL. We have 15 models with data. Need to export data from SQLite, create PostgreSQL schema, import data, and verify integrity.
evals.expected_output: Database migration plan: schema creation, data export/import, verification, and settings update

assertions.name: schema_creation
assertions.description: PostgreSQL schema created from Django models

assertions.name: data_export
assertions.description: Data exported from SQLite (dumpdata or direct)

assertions.name: data_import
assertions.description: Data imported into PostgreSQL with integrity checks

assertions.name: settings_update
assertions.description: Django DATABASES setting updated for PostgreSQL

assertions.name: verification
assertions.description: Data count and integrity verified after migration

evals.prompt: We need to rename the 'users' table to 'accounts' and the 'name' column to 'display_name' in our NestJS + Prisma project. All foreign keys referencing users need to be updated too.
evals.expected_output: Rename migration with foreign key updates, backward compatibility period, and rollback plan

assertions.name: table_rename
assertions.description: SQL ALTER TABLE RENAME for users → accounts

assertions.name: column_rename
assertions.description: ALTER TABLE RENAME COLUMN for name → display_name

assertions.name: fk_updates
assertions.description: Foreign keys referencing users updated

assertions.name: orm_update
assertions.description: Prisma schema updated with @@map for backward compat

assertions.name: rollback_plan
assertions.description: Rollback migration provided

evals.prompt: Split our monolith's users table into two tables: accounts (id, email, password_hash, role) and profiles (id, account_id, display_name, avatar_url, bio). Need to migrate existing data.
evals.expected_output: Migration creating profiles table, moving data, adding foreign key, and updating queries

assertions.name: new_table
assertions.description: profiles table created with account_id FK

assertions.name: data_migration
assertions.description: Existing profile data moved from users to profiles

assertions.name: foreign_key
assertions.description: account_id foreign key with cascade delete

assertions.name: query_updates
assertions.description: Queries updated to join accounts + profiles

assertions.name: reversible
assertions.description: Down migration can merge tables back

evals.prompt: Our Prisma migration history is corrupted — the migrations folder is out of sync with the actual database schema. Help resolve the drift and get back to a clean state.
evals.expected_output: Drift resolution: baseline current schema, resolve conflicts, and re-establish migration history

assertions.name: drift_detection
assertions.description: Uses prisma migrate diff or db pull to detect drift

assertions.name: baseline
assertions.description: Baselines current database state

assertions.name: history_fix
assertions.description: Resolves migration history to match actual schema

assertions.name: no_data_loss
assertions.description: Resolution doesn't drop or alter existing data

assertions.name: verification
assertions.description: Runs prisma migrate status to verify clean state
